name: Observatory Tourbillon
description: Forged from aerospace-grade titanium, featuring a complex automatic tourbillon movement and an exposed skeleton dial.

name: Phantom Automatic
description: A stealth masterpiece with a brushed stealth-machined case, PVD coating, and a fluoroelastomer strap for maximum comfort.

name: Apex Chronograph
description: Premium surgical steel casing coupled with a hand-stitched Italian leather strap. Designed for the modern motorsport enthusiast.

name: Eclipse Diver
description: Built for the extremes. Features a unidirectional ceramic bezel and a helium escape valve for deep-sea exploration.

name: Nova Skeleton
description: Showcasing the beating mechanical heart. 18k rose gold PVD accents over a meticulously skeletonized dial architecture.

name: Zenith Minimal
description: The ultimate expression of reduction. Three precise hands on a sunburst dial, housed in a thin-profile casing.
